description: Pump P-101 mechanical seal failed during operation causing hydrocarbon leakage of approx 40 litres in Bay 7. Area cordoned, no ignition. Pump switched to standby P-102.
root_cause: Overdue maintenance and seal degradation accelerated by sustained high-temperature operation above 70°C. Seal specification marginal for thermal cycling duty.
corrective_action: Seal replaced (WO-2025-0388). Preventive maintenance interval reduced from 180 to 90 days. Seal specification review with OEM initiated.

description: Technician entered knockout drum V-203 for inspection when portable gas detector alarmed at 8% LEL inside vessel. Entry aborted immediately. Gas test had been performed 45 minutes before entry.
root_cause: Gas testing performed more than 30 minutes before entry, against OISD-105/SOP-CS-012 requirement. Residual hydrocarbon desorbed from sludge after initial test.
corrective_action: SOP-CS-012 re-briefed to all crews. Gas test validity window strictly enforced at 30 minutes. Continuous monitoring made mandatory for vessels with sludge history.

description: During confined space entry preparation for V-201, attendant found entry log incomplete and second gas test skipped after lunch break re-entry.
root_cause: Re-entry after break treated as continuation of original entry. Gas testing not repeated as required before re-entry.
corrective_action: Re-entry gas testing requirement added to PTW checklist. Toolbox talk conducted across Unit 3 and Unit 4.

description: Reboiler HE-303 tube leak detected via product contamination. Unit throughput reduced 30% for 3 days until repair.
root_cause: Chloride stress corrosion cracking at tube-to-tubesheet joints. Cooling water chloride excursion in Aug 2025 identified as contributing factor.
corrective_action: 6 tubes plugged (WO-2025-0489). Cooling water chloride monitoring frequency increased to daily. Metallurgy upgrade study initiated.

description: Unit 4 feed interruption for 40 minutes when P-201 tripped on seal failure and standby did not auto-start due to selector switch left in manual.
root_cause: Seal failure (second in 8 months, same pattern as P-101). Standby auto-start defeated by switch position — human factor.
corrective_action: Seal replaced (WO-2026-0114). Selector switch position added to shift handover checklist.
